eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Brown; Cottonwood; Jackson; Murray; Nobles; Redwood; Watonwan, MN; at 9:10 AM on AUG 8, 2019 Effective until 9:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test of the IPAWS system. If this was an actual emergency, further instructions would follow.
